quiz.question:
White offers a queen trade.

Can Black trade the queens and why or why not? What’s the evaluation?

answers.text: Black can trade. The position is a draw because Black's queenside pawns can quickly advance.

feedback.text: Excellent! After the queen trade, Black can advance the b-pawn and use the king to monitor White's pawns.

distractors.text: Black can't trade. White's pawns are simply way too dangerous.

feedback.text: That's not quite right. You should try to assess the queen trade once more.

distractors.text: Black can't trade. The position is only a draw because Black can keep checking the white king.

feedback.text: Your evaluation is correct & Black can go for a perpetual, but you ought to assess the queen trade once more.
